features.description: Next.js 15 app scaffolded with TypeScript + Tailwind + App Router; @anthropic-ai/sdk installed; .env.local has ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; app boots on localhost:3000 with a blank landing.
verification: package.json exists with next ^15, react ^19, typescript, tailwindcss deps
@anthropic-ai/sdk appears in package.json dependencies
.env.local exists at project root with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-...
app/layout.tsx and app/page.tsx exist
`npm run build` completes without error (or `next dev` starts and serves 200 at /)

features.description: User can create, list, and delete Topics on /topics. Topics persist in localStorage. Default 'LLM Infrastructure' topic seeded on first load. Header nav links Feed/Saved/Topics with chat toggle.
verification: lib/storage.ts exports typed helpers for topics, feedItems, interactions with try/catch around JSON.parse
Types Topic, FeedItem, Interaction exported from lib/types.ts
/topics page renders list, inline create form (name, description, frequency), delete button
Reloading page preserves created topic
Header component rendered in app/layout.tsx with nav links and chat toggle button

features.description: User selects a topic on /feed, clicks Refresh, and sees 5 LLM-generated feed cards within ~5 seconds. Items have headline, 2-3 sentence summary, plausible source, timestamp. Loading skeleton shown during generation.
verification: app/api/generate-feed/route.ts exists; POSTs to Claude Haiku 4.5 (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)
Route accepts topicId, topicName, topicDescription, savedItems, dismissedItems; returns JSON array of 5 items
/feed page has topic dropdown and Refresh button
Feed cards render with headline, summary, source label, relative timestamp
Skeleton component shown while fetch in flight

features.description: User can mark Read, Save, or Dismiss on each feed card. Visual states: read=dimmed, saved=filled bookmark, dismissed=removed. /saved page lists saved items with topic badge and un-save action; persists across reload.
verification: Each FeedCard renders three action buttons (Read, Save, Dismiss)
Clicking Save writes an Interaction with kind='saved' to localStorage
Clicking Dismiss removes card from feed and records interaction
Read items render visibly dimmed
/saved page lists saved items with topic name badge and un-save button; survives reload

features.description: Right-side chat drawer toggled from header. Two modes (This Topic / Everything). Starter chips. POST /api/chat uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 with relevant items as context. Returns single response (no streaming).
verification: ChatDrawer component with slide-in from right, toggle state
Two-mode selector (topic vs everything)
At least 3 starter chips that prefill input
app/api/chat/route.ts POSTs to claude-sonnet-4-6 with items context
User message + assistant reply render in thread; spinner shown during call

features.description: Create Memo button on /saved opens a modal with Sonnet-generated markdown (Title, TL;DR bullets, Themes, Pull Quotes w/ source, Next Actions). Copy Markdown and Download .md buttons work.
verification: Create Memo button visible on /saved
app/api/memo/route.ts returns structured markdown string from claude-sonnet-4-6
Modal renders markdown (react-markdown or inline converter)
Copy button writes to navigator.clipboard
Download button triggers download of .md file

features.description: Daily Brief card (paragraph) and Signal card (cross-topic pattern) render at top of /feed. Both backed by Sonnet. Cached in localStorage with 6-hour TTL. Each has a small refresh button.
verification: DailyBrief component at top of /feed; calls /api/brief; shows single paragraph
Signal component below DailyBrief; calls /api/signal; shows cross-topic pattern
Both routes use claude-sonnet-4-6
Responses cached in localStorage with timestamp; reused within 6h
Refresh button forces regeneration

features.description: Final pass: layout clean on desktop, all three routes plus chat drawer functional, PRD success criteria checked, quiet minimal aesthetic.
verification: No TypeScript errors (`npx tsc --noEmit` clean, or Next build passes)
/, /feed, /saved, /topics all return 200
Color palette restrained (neutral + 1 accent), consistent spacing
Empty states render non-broken copy
PRD success criteria 1-7 all demonstrable
